title: Find My Device - Screen with No Devices Connected
scenario: Verify the "No Devices Connected" screen displays correctly when opening Find My Device from App Settings, showing a map, warning sign, error message, and "Not seeing your device?" button.
expected: The screen displays a map, a warning sign, the message "No devices were found. Connect your Poly device using Bluetooth and try again.", and a "Not seeing your device?" button.
